name: Taro Soup
steps: Cut the taro into cubes and keep the trimmings.
In a pan, toast the ginger and garlic in the oil. Deglaze with oyster sauce, soy, and chicken stock.
Cook the trimmings with this for 30 minutes on a light simmer.
Strain this and discard the cooking trimmings.
Cook the cubed taro in the taro stock gently for 3-5 minutes until the taro is just cooked but not mushy.
Blast chill straight away to not overcook the taro.

other_details.notes: Pay attention to the cooking of the taro cubes, not raw, not mushy.
